CustomProperties.Name: OnCancelPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Se dispara al presionar CANCEL - volver a Live Production

CustomProperties.Name: OnEndJobPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Se dispara al confirmar END JOB - navegar a Summary

CustomProperties.Name: OnPauseJobPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Se dispara al presionar PAUSE JOB - guardar estado y volver a Numbers

CustomProperties.Name: UnitsProduced
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Total de unidades producidas al momento

Rules.InvariantScript: "This will close the job order and move to production summary"
"PAUSE saves progress and returns to job selection. END closes the job permanently and generates the production summary."
